signal_title: Digital Asset Market Clarity Act of 2025
risk_rationale: The Digital Asset Market Clarity Act of 2025 introduces federal oversight for digital commodity marketplaces, which may impact TikTok's e-commerce and payment operations if digital assets are integrated. Currently, TikTok's baseline does not explicitly address digital assets, indicating a moderate risk that can be resolved within a quarter.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Federal oversight of digital commodity marketplaces
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline does not address compliance with federal oversight for digital commodity marketplaces, which may be required if TikTok integrates digital assets into its platform.
The baseline does not include a compliance roadmap for digital assets, which may be necessary under the new legislation.

remediations.title: Integrate Digital Asset Compliance Framework
remediations.description: Develop and implement a compliance framework for digital assets in alignment with the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act of 2025, ensuring adherence to federal oversight requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Compliance framework for digital assets is documented and approved
Federal oversight requirements are integrated into platform operations

business_impact: The integration of digital asset compliance may open new revenue streams through digital commodities but requires investment in compliance infrastructure.
recommended_actions: Conduct a detailed impact assessment of digital asset integration
Develop a compliance roadmap for digital assets
Engage with legal counsel to ensure alignment with federal oversight requirements
